examples: They brought back the old tradition.
Can you bring back some food?
He brought back the tools to the garage.
The smell brought back childhood memories.
The place brings back bad memories.
That photo brings back happy times.
She brought back souvenirs from her trip.
Please bring back the book when you're done.
It brings back memories of our vacation.
example_translate: Она привезла сувениры из своей поездки.
Это вызывает воспоминания об нашем отпуске.
bring back.synonyms:
Возвращать, приносить обратно - return, restore
Вызывать воспоминания - remind, evoke memories
